creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
JVim (Japanized Vim-2.0) is a text editor that is upwards compatible
to vi. It can be used to edit any ASCII and Japanese(EUC or JIS) text.
It is especially useful for editing programs.

ONEW is a library for using Japanese Input Method Canna, Wnn4, or
Wnn6.

JVim uses the ONEW library, and can input Japanese by it.

Fix: The following file has ten ports:

jvim
jvim-canna
jvim-canna+wnn4
jvim-canna+wnn6
jvim-wnn4
jvim-wnn6
onew-canna
onew-canna+wnn4
onew-canna+wnn6
onew-wnn4
onew-wnn6

-- Satoshi TAOKA
